SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-05-2025 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF DEFENDANT TO FEB-06-2026 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF FEB-06-2026 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF FEB-06-2026 BY VISITING JUDGE HURLEY. PLAINTIFF TYLER COKE IS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF CHLOE COKE IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT AZAM KHAN IS PRESENT. PROOF OF SERVICE WAS FOUND DEFECTIVE AT THE PREVIOUS HEARING. THE PLAINTIFF REQUESTS TO DISMISS THE CASE AGAINST DEFENDANT CAROL DINEEN REALTY, INC. WITHOUT PREJUDICE AND HAVE THE MATTER HEARD ON DEFENDANT AZAM KHAN. FILING WAIVES FOR AZAM KHAN. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: JOSEPH HURLEY; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-06-2026 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF COKE, TYLER COKE, CHLOE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT KHAN, AZAM $5,818.92 PRINCIPAL, $125.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,943.92, CO-DEFENDANT (CAROL DINEEN REALTY) DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE BY PLAINTIFFS STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
ORDER OF EXAMINATION ISSUED (SIGNED BY: JUDGE MICHELLE TONG) ***SEE 4-24-26 FOR FILING FEE*** AS TO PLAINTIFF COKE, TYLER COKE, CHLOE HEARING SET FOR JUN-15-2026 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT 506
ORDER ON REQUEST FOR COURT ORDER. THE COURT MAKES THE FOLLOWING ORERS: THE REQUEST IS DENIED. EXPLANATION FOR DECISION; PERSONAL SERVICE IS LEGALLY REQUIRED.

DOES NOT DEMONSTRATE PROOF OF DELIVERY OR OTHER ACCEPTABLE SUBSTITUTE SERVICE. CASE CONTINUED TO ALLOW PROPER SERVICE ON BOTH DEFENDANTS BY JUDGE PRO TEMPORE SCOTT BORROWMAN. APPEARANCES: PLAINTIFFS TYLER COKE AND CHLOE TYLER ARE PRESENT. DEFENDANTS AZAM KHAN AND CAROL DINEEN REALTY, INC. ARE NOT PRESENT. CLERK: M. DE LUNA. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
